Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPORG2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Organization SEARCH;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DIC 10090 ; SRCHORG(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N QRYRSLT,IX,RSLTARY,PAGING,BUFFER,SMRY,CNT,OUT,DVPORG,RECMAX,EXTID,EXIT,RECFND,CODE,NAME S (SMRY,CNT,IX,DVPCNT,EXIT,RECFND)=0,RECMAX=100,(EXTID,CODE)="" D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS),CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; ; Search by name I $P($G(QUERYPAR("name")),U)'="" D . D LIST^DIC(4,,,,,"",$P($G(QUERYPAR("name")),U),"","","","OUT") ; ; Search by Id I $P($G(QUERYPAR("identifier")),U)'="" D G:EXIT QUIT . S EXTID("SYSTEMS",1)="VASTANUM",EXTID("SYSTEMS",2)="IEN",EXTID("SYSTEMS",3)="DMIS",EXTID("SYSTEMS",4)="http://lighthouse.va.gov/identifiers/vista/ien" . I '$$PRSIDENT^DVPUTLS(.EXTID) S EXIT=1 Q . ; use IEN . I $D(EXTID("CODE")),(($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN")!($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="")!($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))=EXTID("SYSTEMS",4))) D . . S EXTID=EXTID("CODE") . . I ($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN")!($P(EXTID,":",4)'="")!($P(EXTID,":",4)=EXTID("SYSTEMS",4)) I '$$SITECHK^DVPXUTL(EXTID,"SRCHORG^DVPORG2") S EXIT=1 Q . . I +$P(EXTID,":",5)=0,$G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN" D S EXIT=1 Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","code-invalid","MSG_ID_INVALID","The supplied organizationId: "_EXTID_" has an invalid format.","SRCHORG^DVPORG2") . . I $P($G(EXTID),":",5)="",(($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN")!($G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))=EXTID("SYSTEMS",4))) D S EXIT=1 Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Organization Identifier: "_EXTID_" does not have the correct format.","SRCHORG^DVPORG2") . . S IEN=$P($G(EXTID),":",5) K ARRAY D GETS^DIQ(4,IEN_",","**","","ARRAY") I $D(ARRAY)'=10,$G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="IEN" D S EXIT=1 Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Organization record found for organizationId: "_EXTID_".","SRCHORG^DVPORG2") . . I $D(ARRAY)=10 D . . . D FHIRORG^DVPORG1(EXTID,.DVPORG,SMRY) . . . S OUT("DILIST",0)=1,OUT("DILIST",2,IEN)=IEN,RECFND=1 D PACK ; Search by code I EXTID'="",'RECFND D G:EXIT QUIT . S EXIT=0 . ; Search by specific CODING (VASTANUM or DMIS) . I $G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))'="",$G(EXTID("CODE"))'="" D Q:EXIT . . S IEN="",IEN=$O(^DIC(4,"XUMFIDX",EXTID("SYSTEM"),EXTID("CODE"),IEN)) I IEN="" D S EXIT=1 Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Organization record found for code: "_EXTID("CODE")_".","SRCHORG^DVPORG2") . . D FHIRORG^DVPORG1(IEN,.DVPORG,SMRY) . . S OUT("DILIST",0)=1,OUT("DILIST",2,IEN)=IEN,RECFND=1 D PACK . ; Search by CODING (all systems) . I $G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))="",$G(EXTID("CODE"))'="" D Q:EXIT . . N FIEN,FCODE,CODE S (FIEN,FCODE)="" F CODE="VASTANUM","DMIS" D . . . S IEN="",IEN=$O(^DIC(4,"XUMFIDX",CODE,EXTID("CODE"),IEN)) I IEN'="" S FCODE=CODE,FIEN=IEN . . I FIEN="" D S EXIT=1 Q . . . D OOERR^DVPERR(TARGET,"fatal","not-found","MSG_NO_EXIST","No Organization record found for code: "_EXTID("CODE")_".","SRCHORG^DVPORG2") . . D FHIRORG^DVPORG1(FIEN,.DVPORG,SMRY) . . S OUT("DILIST",0)=1,OUT("DILIST",2,FIEN)=FIEN,RECFND=1 D PACK . ; Return all records with SYSTEM . I $G(EXTID("SYSTEM"))'="",$G(EXTID("CODE"))="" D Q:EXIT . . I EXTID("SYSTEM")="IEN" D . . . S (NAME,IEN)="" F S NAME=$O(^DIC(4,"B",NAME)) Q:NAME="" D . . . . S IEN="",IEN=$O(^DIC(4,"B",NAME,IEN)) I IEN'="" D . . . . . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=IEN . . I (EXTID("SYSTEM")="VASTANUM")!(EXTID("SYSTEM")="DMIS") D . . . S DVPCNT=0 F S CODE=$O(^DIC(4,"XUMFIDX",EXTID("SYSTEM"),CODE)) Q:CODE="" D . . . . S IEN="",IEN=$O(^DIC(4,"XUMFIDX",EXTID("SYSTEM"),CODE,IEN)) I IEN'="" D . . . . . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=IEN ; ; Search by address I $P($G(QUERYPAR("address")),U)'="" D . D LIST^DIC(4,,"@;.01;.02;.03;1.01;1.02;1.03;1.04;4.01;4.02;4.03;4.04;4.05",,,"","","","","","OUT") . N IX,FLD S DVPCNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(OUT("DILIST","ID",IX)) Q:IX="" D . . S FND=0,FLD="" F S FLD=$O(OUT("DILIST","ID",IX,FLD)) Q:FLD="" D Q:FND=1 . . . I $$LOW^XLFSTR(OUT("DILIST","ID",IX,FLD))[$$LOW^XLFSTR($P($G(QUERYPAR("address")),U)) D S FND=1 . . . . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=OUT("DILIST",2,IX) ; N PAGING S DFN="" D:+DVPCNT>0 . D PAGING^DVPUTLS(DVPCNT,.PAGING) G:$G(PAGING("OO")) QUIT . I DVPCNT>RECMAX,$P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("count")),U)="" D . . N NODE S PAGING("REND")=RECMAX,NODE=$NA(@TARGET@("results","warning","OperationOutcome","issue","severity")) . . S @NODE@("severity")="warning" . . S @NODE@("code")="too-costly" . . S @NODE@("details")="" ; Operation Outcome Codes . . S @NODE@("diagnostics")="The query returned too many records. The result will be trimmed to "_RECMAX_" records. Consider using paging." . . S @NODE@("location")="SRCHPAT^DVPFPT1" . F RSLTCNT=PAGING("RSTART"):1:PAGING("REND") Q:RSLTCNT=0 D . . D FHIRORG^DVPORG1($$SETUID^DVPXUTL("organization","",RSLTARY(RSLTCNT)),.DVPORG,SMRY) . . M @TARGET@("results","bundle",RSLTCNT)=DVPORG D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS ; QUIT ; Q ; PACK ; ; Pack the data I $D(OUT) D . S IEN="",DVPCNT=0 F S IEN=$O(OUT("DILIST",2,IEN)) Q:IEN="" D . . I OUT("DILIST",2,IEN)'="" S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=OUT("DILIST",2,IEN) Q
